chunks.text: The education of Brett the robot - EECS at Berkeley CS Prof. Pieter Abbeel, graduate student Chelsea Finn, and Brett the robot are featured in a Wired article titled “ The Education of Brett the Robot ” which delves into some of the nuts and bolts of machine learning. Brett (short for Berkeley Robot for the Elimination of Tedious Tasks) is using a reinforcement learning algorithm to allow it to learn from its mistakes. Abbeel will speak on “ Deep Learning-to-Learn Robotic Control ” at the EECS Colloquium on October 11th. Categories Faculty Research Students View Open Faculty Positions
